sync_architecture.description: User Story <-> Forgejo Issue bidirectional sync with Wiki PRD publishing

Update existing Issue from Story changes

strengths: PRD Wiki publish with source reference
Acceptance criteria preserved in Issue body
recommendations: Test with Forgejo API authentication failure scenarios
Add conflict resolution for simultaneous edits
Test with repositories requiring Cloudflare Access
